title: Copilot Welcome Page: Title line height is too small
body: Title line height is too small, so the text overlaps with itself when it wraps
comments: Hi @jruales @benibenj @bpasero ! I think I might know the fix for this issue and would like to work on it. Could you please assign it to me?
Sharing media from merged PR #304686 for verification: Source PR: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode/pull/304686
